notes: Exceptional submission. Agent created comprehensive mapreduce_timeline.md with all required sections: 27-entry chronological event timeline with millisecond precision, 6-phase diagram (Init 5.5s → Map 147.8s → Shuffle 55.9s → Reduce 80.7s → Commit 0.0s → Cleanup 1.2s), ASCII Gantt chart for all 10 mappers + reducer with speculation attempts marked, critical events table (13 events with severity ratings), and detailed concurrency analysis sampled every 5 seconds showing peak of 10 concurrent containers. Correctly identified all major events: job start 15:37:56, first map completion m_000009 at 82.2s, speculative launches for m_000006 and m_000007, HDFS pipeline error recovery at datanode 10.86.164.9, job success at 15:42:47 (~4m51s total). Includes accurate per-task durations table and thoughtful conclusions on speculation inefficiency and slow-start thresholds. Visualizations are clear and functional. Minor: duplicate file created (mapreduce_timeline_1.md) but primary output is pristine. Exceeds task requirements in depth and quality.
